config.moemusic_pv_ducking.enabled.toolt: Lower MoeMusic volume while at least one Plasmo Voice speaker is actively audible on this client.
config.moemusic_pv_ducking.volume_mode.t: Choose whether ducking caps MoeMusic to a fixed percent value or scales it to a percent of the configured MoeMusic volume.
config.moemusic_pv_ducking.value.tooltip: 0-100. In fixed mode this is a cap, not a boost target: effective volume never exceeds MoeMusic's configured volume. In percent mode it scales the configured volume by this percent while speakers are active.
